name: OrganizationContract
glossary: Tenant-level organization owning workspaces, venues, users, and data-residency policy.

name: WorkspaceContract
glossary: Migration seam for a portfolio or workspace container grouping venue/project records inside one organization.

name: VenueContextContract
glossary: Runtime venue context passed into intake and engine runs.

name: VenueProjectContract
glossary: Canonical venue or project record carrying lifecycle, ownership, and operational context.

name: AssessmentSignalState
glossary: Manual or AI-suggested state of a single signal inside an assessment draft or run request.

name: AssessmentDraftContract
glossary: Persisted assessment snapshot before or after a run, including raw text and selected signals.

name: AssessmentRunRequestContract
glossary: Validated request payload for running the engine from saved assessment state or fresh intake.

name: SignalContract
glossary: Normalized signal or intake-detected signal with evidence and severity metadata.

name: FailureModeContract
glossary: Activated failure mode with score and contributing signal ids.

name: ResponsePatternTriggerContract
glossary: Link between a response pattern and the failure mode that triggered it.

name: ResponsePatternContract
glossary: Activated response pattern with priority and L1/L2/L3 guidance.

name: BlockActivationLevelsContract
glossary: Activated block ids grouped by execution layer.

name: BlockActivationContract
glossary: Response-pattern-to-block activation contract used by diagnostic outputs.

name: TaskDependencyContract
glossary: Explicit dependency edge between two tasks rather than an implicit string list.

name: TaskCommentContract
glossary: Human commentary attached to a task; intentionally distinct from progress, observations, and escalations.

name: TaskEventContract
glossary: Immutable task event log such as status changes, follow-up creation, or escalation.

name: SubActionContract
glossary: Checklist item nested under a task.

name: DeliverableItemContract
glossary: Deliverable status record nested under a task.

name: DeliverableProofContract
glossary: Proof artifact or evidence that a deliverable was completed or verified.

name: TaskContract
glossary: Operational plan task with execution state, nested checklist items, deliverables, comments, and events.

name: GeneratedPlanTaskContract
glossary: Legacy engine-generated task before persistence flattening or execution-state enrichment.

name: GeneratedPlanContract
glossary: Legacy engine-generated plan grouped by L1/L2/L3 layers; intentionally distinct from persisted plans.

name: PlanContract
glossary: Operational plan returned by the engine or persisted for execution work.

name: ReportContract
glossary: Frozen report artifact; intentionally distinct from comments, help requests, and progress entries.

name: DiagnosticResultContract
glossary: Complete engine response including signals, modes, patterns, activations, plan, and report.

name: ProgressEntryContract
glossary: Progress feed entry; intentionally keeps entry_type so milestone, note, and update are not flattened.

name: ObservationContract
glossary: Observed fact or field note from audit, staff, customer, or consultant input.

name: HelpRequestContract
glossary: Explicit request for help or explanation; intentionally distinct from general chat and task comments.

name: FollowUpContract
glossary: Execution-control reminder tied to a task with overdue and escalation semantics.

name: EscalationContract
glossary: Higher-severity execution control object used when a follow-up or task requires intervention.

name: NotificationSubscriptionContract
glossary: Request payload for registering a delivery endpoint such as web push.

name: NotificationEventContract
glossary: User-facing notification event with delivery and acknowledgement timestamps.

name: ChatReferenceContract
glossary: Structured reference embedded in a chat message.

name: ChatAttachmentContract
glossary: Attachment metadata embedded in a chat message create/read payload.

name: ChatMessageContract
glossary: Copilot or user message in a thread.

name: ChatThreadContract
glossary: Copilot thread summary/detail payload including messages.

name: KnowledgeReferenceContract
glossary: KB or ontology reference entity used by chat, reports, and guided workflows.

name: AITraceContract
glossary: Auditable record of an AI invocation including model, prompt version, and evidence refs.

name: AIIntakeSnapshotContract
glossary: Frozen AI-assisted intake snapshot including unmapped observations and extraction coverage notes.

name: TaskMutationRequestContract
glossary: Validated request payload for task status and checklist mutation.

name: CommentCreateRequestContract
glossary: Validated request payload for adding a task comment.

name: ProgressCreateRequestContract
glossary: Validated request payload for adding a typed progress entry.

name: FollowUpCreateRequestContract
glossary: Validated request payload for creating a follow-up reminder.

name: EscalationCreateRequestContract
glossary: Validated request payload for opening an escalation.

name: ChatMessageCreateRequestContract
glossary: Validated request payload for posting a chat message with attachments.
